title: EDEN wire — deposit artifact response
description: Response body for a successful POST /v0/experiments/{E}/artifacts (07-wire-protocol.md §16.1). Carries the opaque, server-issued artifacts_uri the depositor stamps onto the idea / variant / submission it subsequently creates, plus the recorded byte size and content type.

artifacts_uri.description: The opaque, deployment-local artifact URI (reference deployment: eden://artifacts/<opaque-id>). Opaque to clients (02-data-model.md §1.5) — resolved only by presenting it to fetch_artifact.
